use_cases: Primary action triggers with secondary dropdown options in toolbars and action menus
Form submission buttons with loading states for async operations
Context-sensitive action buttons with multiple variant types and sizes
Navigation and workflow step triggers with disabled states
ai_summary: A versatile split-button component with multiple visual variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), sizes (tiny to large), and shapes (square, circle, rounded). Features loading and disabled states, customizable prefix/suffix slots, and shadow options. The split-button pattern provides a primary action trigger alongside a secondary dropdown/chevron area for additional options, commonly used in action toolbars, form controls, and context menus across SaaS and web applications.
